Digital Transformation · Enterprise AI · Automation

Hi, I'm Aditya. I help global enterprises make AI and technology work for people.

For 12+ years I've worked on enterprise technology and service transformation at GE HealthCare, GE and HCLTech, deploying ServiceNow, AI agents, chatbots and knowledge platforms that serve employees worldwide. Here I share what actually works.

About me

From frontline support to global AI programs

I started in technical support at Dell in 2013. Today I work on global service-enablement technology at GE HealthCare, spanning ServiceNow HRSD, Agentic AI, chatbot ecosystems and knowledge platforms used by employees around the world.

Along the way I've helped navigate one of the largest corporate separations in history, reduced unresolved chatbot queries by 84%, and built playbooks that keep global shared services running.

Read my full story

Currently focused on

  • ServiceNow HRSD readiness & Knowledge + AI content migration
  • Agentic AI and chatbot expansion for HR service channels
  • AI-assisted content review and service automation
  • Global HR portal governance and adoption strategy
